deferred.reason: MRB-domain policies (no autonomous disposition of nonconforming material; use-as-is or repair on a critical characteristic must carry documented customer/design-authority concurrence before closure; med-device rework must attach re-verification evidence per ISO 13485 / 21 CFR 820.90; an escape assessment must precede any release of customer-return stock) require guardrail-service / OPA policy materialization, which Core does not expose as a pack surface yet. The behavioral core is partially covered today by Core invariants: every pack-configured agent is proposal-mode with four-eyes approval (agent-runtime), and the agent instructions + disposition taxonomy route final dispositions exclusively to human engineers with the Quality Manager as approver.

Bespoke LangGraph recipes (NC Intake Copilot, MRB Package Builder, Supplier SCAR Drafter, Containment Sweep Sentinel, Escape Notification Assessor) require agent-runtime graph-module registration (BRD 23 BR-12). This pack specializes the existing case-triage + analytics agents via TenantAgentConfig prompt_params + tenant-scope RAG grounding instead.

Production read connectors (QMS platforms: ETQ Reliance, MasterControl, Arena, Greenlight Guru; ERP quality modules: SAP QM, Oracle Quality; MES/SPC systems and CMM/inspection-result feeds; PLM for drawing and characteristic data; supplier portals for certs and SCAR responses) require customer credentials and pack-service connector materialization. The pack ships seed datasets in the exact landing shape; production connectors are configured through the product Data > Connections UI.

Write adapters (write the approved disposition back to the QMS/ERP nonconformance record, issue a SCAR through the supplier portal, place or lift a stock/ship hold in MES/ERP, generate a concession/waiver request package to the customer or design authority, open an escape notification) execute only behind pack-service's materialization contract and customer credentials; every such write stays proposal-mode with human approval — no autonomous material release, hold, or supplier action, ever.

Golden eval sets (disposition triage accuracy, containment-scope recall on suspect lots, SCAR-routing precision, escape-risk ranking) require eval-service write APIs whose action names are not yet in the rbac canonical catalog (Core follow-up noted in rbac catalog.go).

Ontology registration (Nonconformance, Lot, Part, Characteristic, Supplier, Program, Disposition, MRBReview, Concession, SCAR, Containment, Escape, CertificateOfConformance) awaits pack-service; entity semantics are carried today by the mrb_core semantic model and dataset schemas.

Typed case schemas (nc_intake, mrb_review, supplier_scar, containment_sweep, escape_assessment) await case-service schema materialization; today's cases carry the same fields via display_projection + the disposition taxonomy.

Model archetypes (disposition_confidence, escape_risk_score) await experiment-service archetype APIs; the scoring capability ships as pipeline seeds instead (isolation_forest lot anomaly + xgboost disposition-outcome scorer) with model-governance expectations noted in grounding memories.

Display-label overlays ("Nonconformance", "MRB queue", "Disposition due", "Containment active", entity templates) require the BFF label-registry endpoints (BFF-FR-082/088) which are pack-service-tier features.
